title: Adam was spawned from Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Adam was spawned from Lilith???             Quote Post by ProfessorKaos64 » Wed Apr 21, 2010 8:18 am In EoE, Misato makes the statement that Adam was spawned from Lilith about 22:00 into the film, I though Lilith only spawned Mankind and other LCL beings? What gives?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Apr 21, 2010 8:24 am You've obviously misinterpreted. Adam, a Seed of Life, spawned the Angels. Lilith, another Seed of Life, spawned mankind. These two Seeds are on an equal tier with each other, and neither spawned the other.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Apr 21, 2010 8:28 am Poorly translated dialogue is poorly translated. Misato states: "Mankind was spawned from a being called Lilith, just like Adam was." It should have translated to: "Mankind was spawned from a being like Adam called Lilith." It indicates that Adam was born from Lilith, which has been revealed to be false. Adam is the seed that spawned the Angels. Lilith is the seed that spawned Humanity.

[]:             Quote Post by ProfessorKaos64 » Wed Apr 21, 2010 8:30 am I understood that from the beginning, however, watch that part in the film and they actually say that: "They had to reduce Adam to an embryonic state...before the other Angels awoke. You see, Shinju, mankind was spawned from a being called Lilith, just like Adam was" Guess I am misinterpreting, but that seems pretty apparent, unless its a mistake, which It has to be.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Apr 21, 2010 8:41 am ProfessorKaos64 wrote: Guess I am misinterpreting

[]:             Quote Post by ProfessorKaos64 » Wed Apr 21, 2010 8:42 am I posted right after you did, it was an internet timing FAIL lol. I got ya.
